signals.headline: Russia and Ukraine agreed to a temporary Easter ceasefire from 16:00 April 11 to end of April 12, 2026
signals.raw:
Russia and Ukraine agreed to a temporary Easter ceasefire from 16:00 April 11 to end of April 12, 2026.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4]
